channel.title: Internationalization :: Flutter en rigle.dev
channel.description: Flutter internationalization exercises: flutter_localizations, ARB files, AppLocalizations, runtime language change, and pluralization.

item.title: Internationalization in Flutter: solved exercise with flutter_localizations and ARB files
item.description: Solved Flutter internationalization exercise: flutter_localizations, gen-l10n, ARB files, AppLocalizations, pluralization, and parameterized translations.

item.title: Runtime language change in Flutter: solved exercise
item.description: Solved Flutter runtime language change exercise: manage locale with Provider, persist selection with SharedPreferences, and dynamically update MaterialApp.
